---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for dbgraph
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the use case and why the current behavior
falls short.

## Proposed solution

What you would like dbgraph to do. Be as concrete as you can.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches or workarounds you have thought about, and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Anything else — related engines/agents, links to the relevant `openspec/specs/`
capability, or examples.
